name: Aurora
description: Inspired by the first light of dawn, the Aurora collection sets exceptional brilliant-cut diamonds in fluid, luminous settings that seem to move with the wearer.

name: Monarch
description: Bold, architectural and unapologetically grand. Monarch celebrates the rarest stones with settings worthy of a crown.

name: Éternelle
description: A study in rhythm and repetition — diamonds set edge to edge in an unbroken line, the purest expression of devotion.

name: Céleste
description: Delicate, endlessly sparkling micro-pavé. The Céleste collection scatters the smallest, finest diamonds across featherlight settings.
